section_order.pattern_notes: HERO CTAs ONLY (do not reuse on mid/closing): primary a.cta-btn.act-btn "Try Zoho Analytics for free" + secondary a.act-btn.cal-btn-secondary "Watch demo". Also span.comparison-title + h1 + p + .right-wrapper > img.bimg. NEVER invent progress-timeline cards.

MANDATORY LIVE HTML: .table-wrap > .column.left > .text-wrapper > .acc-wrap×3 (h3+ul+img.acc-img) + .column.right > .image-part > img.step-image×3 (one .active). First .acc-wrap has .current. JS auto-advances current + active image. FORBIDDEN: .progress-timeline / .progress-step / .progress-card / .progress-num
LIVE: h2 + p.title-desc + .limits-grid > .limit-item > p ×6 + p.limits-closing. NOT a <ul> of bare <li>.

LIVE zigzag cream cards: .header-content + alternating .main-wrapper.right-content/.left-content. Each li: . CRITICAL CSS: isolation:isolate on .main-wrapper; ::before #fef8eb 871×570 border-radius 30px z-index:0 (NEVER z-index:-1 — panel vanishes behind page bg); image/content z-index:1; img.dashboard-image border 5px #000 radius 20px. COPY z_workflow/gold-snippets/spreadsheet-reporting-layout.css. Brief may include 6th Built to Scale row.

LIVE column ORDER: Features | Zoho Analytics | Excel (Zoho SECOND column highlighted). Wrap: .comparison-table > table. th.analytics-light on Zoho header; td.analytics-dark / analytics-light zebra on Zoho col; last Zoho td gets .bottom. Gold border #eca91c on col 2.

LIVE: .migration-wrapper.left-content > .image-wrapper > img.bimg.migration-image + .content-wrapper > h2 + p.migration-subtitle + p.migration-description + .migration-steps > .migration-step×4 (.step-icon + .step-content > h4) + p.migration-closing. FORBIDDEN: bare <ul class="migration-steps"><li>

MID CTAs ONLY (distinct from hero/closing): h2 "Switch to Zoho Analytics today!" + a.cta-btn.act-btn "Sign up for free" + a.act-btn.dwnload-btn "Get a personalized Demo". NEVER reuse "Try Zoho Analytics for free" or "Watch demo" here.
Include when brief lists Customer stories — placeholder .za-custories-data cards OK. Live page may omit; brief wins for presence.
SKIP when report_slider injected — empty shell before #conclusion

CLOSING CTAs ONLY (distinct primary from hero/mid): class light + peach gradient. Primary a.cta-btn.act-btn "Start your free trial today!" + secondary a.act-btn.dwnload-btn "Sign up for free". NEVER reuse hero "Try Zoho Analytics for free" as primary here. Copy h2 from brief (Advanced analytics made affordable).

PLACEHOLDER ONLY — emit header shell: h2 Hear from our happy customers + See all testimonials link + empty .zwc-nav-scroll-section. DO NOT append .zwc-nav-box cards, quotes, names, or photos. Comment: <!-- TODO: INSERT TESTIMONIALS HERE -->. Brief may say Customer testimony.

section_order.pattern_notes: Live Athena: .zbanner-section — product logos + h1 + lead + .cta-btn.act-btn. Brief CTA label ACCESS ZOHO ANALYTICS (live often Sign up for free — prefer brief). Hero image: prezoho + TODO.
Trusted by great brands heading. SKIP composing when ★ Trusted Brands pipeline inject is on — brief marker <TRUSTED BY GREAT BRANDS>.
Customer / Users / Reports counters row (live Athena: 14K / 2M / 50M). SKIP when trusted-brands inject covers counters.
What is {Database}? — centered definition block from brief (SQLite / Athena / …).

Row 1 (no zdb2): Data Import + h2 Bring in data… + desc + .zdashboard-img media (video/img placeholder). Structure: .zdashboard-box.dsp-flx.justify-space > .zdashboard-title + .zdashboard-desc, then .zdashboard-img.
Row 2 MUST add class zdb2 (alternate zigzag). Data Preparation + Enrich the quality…
Row 3 (no zdb2): Live Connect + Set up a live connection…
Row 4 MUST add class zdb2. Data Blending + Unified analytics…

Key features grid — 4 cards. Icons are IMAGES on live (h4::before sprite/PNG), NOT text — scaffold MUST emit visible + TODO above each h4. Markup: .zconnecting-list (Incremental / Predictive / Conversational) + .ziaicon-list (Zia Insights). h4 classes: .zicon-safer · (none for Zia) · .zicon-forecast · .zicon-share.
OPTIONAL — only when brief has a competitor comparison (e.g. Amazon QuickSight and Zoho Analytics). SQLite Writer draft has NONE — SKIP this section (matches live sqlite.html).

MANDATORY when brief says CUSTOMER TESTIMONY. Emit VISIBLE shell: h2 Our Customer love us + .ztesti-box > .ztesti-cust-details (.ztesti-pic img prezoho + strong/p TODOs) + .ztesti-cust-desc h4 TODO quote. Include <!-- TODO: INSERT TESTIMONIALS HERE -->. Do NOT invent real quotes/names. Never leave an empty section that collapses to zero height.

BOX CARD layout (not flat columns). COPY CSS from z_workflow/gold-snippets/database-connector-zresrc-cards.css. Markup: .zresrc-box[.zresrc-box--4 if 4 items] > .zresrc-list ×N. Each .zresrc-list MUST be a card: padding 35px · border-radius 12px · box-shadow 0 0 20px rgba(208,208,208,.23) · background #fff. Content: icon + h4 + optional p from brief + Learn more (blue #03a9f5 underline + ::after chevron). Athena live = 3 cards; SQLite brief = 4 → add .zresrc-box--4. Do NOT invent descriptions when brief only lists titles.

Closing band: h2 from brief (Start exploring your SQLite data…) + .cta-btn.act-btn. Live Athena uses .zbottom-section (often a div) — emit <section class="zbottom-section" id="conclusion">. Style from state.similarity.end_banner — never plain white.

mandatory_css: .page-container .cta-btn.act-btn { display: inline-block; visibility: visible; opacity: 1; background: var(--primary-btn-color); color: #fff; }

.page-container button:focus, .page-container button:focus-visible, .page-container a.act-btn:focus, .page-container a.act-btn:focus-visible, .page-container a.cta-btn:focus, .page-container a.cta-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: none; }

app-connector-landing.description: Business-app / SaaS connector landings (Shopify, HubSpot, Stripe, …) — live Shopify gold: hero, trusted brands, native-app pitch, why-choose accordion + dashboards, key-features grid, optional related connectors, testimony, ratings, how-tos, closing CTA. NOT database-connector (Athena/SQLite).
brief_signals: Why choose Zoho Analytics for your Shopify store
Your Shopify data, transformed into actionable insights
app-connector-landing.writer_page_hints: 1-page Writer draft · ~3500+ chars. Layout gold = shopify-advanced-analytics.html. Placeholders: Trusted by great brands · Customer testimony · Rated the best · Solutions/How-tos. Do NOT match database-connector-landing (Data blending alone is not enough). ★ Trusted Brands inject variant=branding-section (NOT za-brandsCounts marquee).

trusted_brands_inject.heading: TRUSTED BY GREAT BRANDS
trusted_brands_inject.notes: Same branding-section layout as mobile-apps (bc1 counter + bc2 logos). Skip composing when inject is on.

required_strings: Why choose Zoho Analytics for your Shopify store

section_order.pattern_notes: Live umain screenshots: CENTERED .header-section.banner-shown — h1+lead+ACCESS ZOHO ANALYTICS (no signup column). BELOW .header-banner-slider.slide-wrap > .hb-slider > img. MUST include .header-banner-slider::after cream→white transition. ❌ Do NOT use split signup form for scaffold.

TRUSTED BY GREAT BRANDS. Gold: .branding-logos max 880px · table wrap · bc1 220px pink card · bc2 pad-left 60px · float 20% logo sprites · dual .ec counters (22 Thousand / 4 Million) rotate 2s · scroll .line-animated → scaleEffect on logos. SKIP composing when ★ Trusted Brands pipeline inject is on — brief marker <Trusted by great brands>.

Gold 5919.css: content-wrap pad 40px 150px 40px 170px · h2 30px #f1dc05 · absolute .act-btn.apps-link black pill top:10 right:40 · 2-col .sbs-list-wrap + sprite check ::before · .saa-icon1–4 float zodd/zeven. ❌ Not .sbs-head flex · ❌ Not red CTA below list.

Why choose… intro + accordion tabs ×N from brief (Shopify draft = 4: Maximize sales · Analyze orders · Optimize inventory · Monitor sales trend). Each tab: title + desc + dashboard img placeholder. Live JS accordion.
Advanced … Key features — 6 cards. CTA is OUTLINED black border button (.outline-btn), not red act-btn — matches live EXPLORE MORE FEATURES.
ALWAYS compose for Shopify: left intro (icon + Other related connectors + VIEW MORE CONNECTORS outline btn) · right pastel cards Zoho Inventory / CRM / Survey. Writer shows connector placeholders.
PLACEHOLDER when brief has <Customer testimony> — shell only + <!-- TODO: INSERT TESTIMONIALS HERE -->. Do not invent quotes.
Rated the best — SKIP or placeholder when brief has <Rated the best> / report slider inject.
Solutions / How-Tos — PLACEHOLDER when brief has <Solutions/How-tos>. Cards with icon + title TODOs.
Closing: Your Shopify data… Join Zoho Analytics today! + Sign up for free. Style via end-banner pool — never plain white.

section_order.pattern_notes: Live: centered .header-section on #fef2f2 — h1 48 + bold lead 17/700 + ACCESS ZOHO ANALYTICS · device/dashboard image below. content-wrap max 1170px. Signup column hidden.

★ Trusted Brands inject variant=branding-section ONLY. SKIP composing. Live: h2 TRUSTED BY GREAT BRANDS · .branding-wrap table · .bc1 220px pink counter (22 Thousand / 4 Million rotate) · .bc2 logo grid. ❌ Never inject .za-brandsCounts marquee for this archetype.
Experience the truly native… — centered h2 38 + lead 17 + bold standout line. pad 60px 15px 70px.

zrow-wrap-accordian · LEFT .image-part tabs-nav-list h3×N · RIGHT .cont-part tabs-stage images. Brief usually 6 features (live may show 4) — instantiate from brief. pad-bottom 100px. h3 active #3b81d3.

bg #faf7f4 · pad 110/125 · .party-flex-wrap · 2× .party-flex-inner (Mobile BI mint #f7fff5 + Dashboards teal #f5fffd) · ol checks · .za-link Read more · .apps-download-links-wrap App Store/Play. Omit .party-hd when brief has no 'Analytics on the move' header.

Hear it from our customers

as SIBLING above
